content.en:
Ye Tian immediately took this piece of vine away, and then quickly left.

After a while, he moved away from here, and then the other clones withdrew one by one, not continuing to fight the ultimate creature.

Subsequently, he found a slightly safer position, and the other replica bodies were responsible for guarding and patrolling the surroundings to prevent interference from other powerful people.

Then, he began to devour the vine to improve his copying talent.

Rumble!!!!

After the vines were devoured and refined, energy continued to pour into the replication talent, allowing the replication talent to slowly metamorphose.

Hurt!

It seemed that the pain that wanted to shatter the will of the soul, but Ye Tian still forcibly endured it.

Time passes, and I don't know how long it has passed.

Finally, the pain disappeared, and in exchange for the excitement of the soul.

His copying talent has finally advanced again, reaching the level of ultimate talent.

"The copying talent has been upgraded, and now I can copy the ultimate talent of those ultimate creatures!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Immediately, he began to search for the ultimate creatures in the Golden True Sea to replicate these ultimate talents.

Soon.

One ultimate talent after another was copied and fused by Ye Tian.

After fusing these copying talents, Ye Tian felt that it was obviously very different, first of all, in terms of comprehension, it was easier to comprehend the rules of the supreme dimension.

Secondly, it is much easier to improve the ultimate will.

Perhaps, it will be much easier for him to create the ultimate dimensional killing move in the future.

Not only that, but his physical fitness was also indirectly tempered and improved, and the limit of his physical body far surpassed the other Nine Realms peaks.

The reason why the physical bodies of those ultimate creatures are so terrifying is because the ultimate talent makes their physical limits even higher.

Therefore, Ye Tian can still continue to refine his physical body and make his physical body stronger.

As more and more of the ultimate talent was being copied, Ye Tian's potential was also skyrocketing rapidly.

Moreover, Ye Tian, who had the ultimate dimensional killing move, felt that he might not need to descend on those dimensional worlds to create his own ultimate dimensional killing move in the sea of dimensions, which was the advantage brought by the ultimate talent.

"You have to go to some special places in the Dimension Sea, according to the information of the Void Heaven Palace, in addition to the Dimension Heaven and Earth, there are also some special places that can also allow people to create the ultimate dimension killing move, but it will be more difficult!"

Ye Tian is not afraid of difficulty, and now that he has the ultimate talent, it may not be difficult for him.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left a replica body to stay in the Golden True Sea, and a replica body sent the obtained treasure resources back to the multidimensional territory.

The other replica bodies rushed to a special place closest to the Golden True Sea.

Light Abyss!

The light abyss is a very special place, in fact, there is nothing else here, just countless rays of light gathered here, being sucked into a point, and this point is very special, it is rumored that even the Ultimate Realm Lord has come over, but he can't destroy this point of light, plus there are no other benefits here, there is no strong person to take care of the abnormality here.

But countless rays of light were sucked in, causing an area to look extremely dark, hence the name Abyss.

The reason why Ye Tian came to Guangyuan was that according to the records of the Void Heaven Palace, there were indeed strong people who created the ultimate dimensional killing move here, the proportion was too low, and it took endless years.

There are even strong people who suspect that those strong people who comprehend the ultimate dimension killing moves here, even if they don't comprehend here, they may also comprehend the ultimate dimension killing moves in such a long time.

Of course, the possibility of relying on oneself to silently comprehend the ultimate dimensional killing move is very low, but this is really not a good treasure land.

But Ye Tian is close to here, so he came over to take a look.

"This abyss of light is very special, it seems that the light has been attracted, but the light here has mutated and seems to have become extremely sharp!"

Ye Tian muttered.

If the ordinary Nine Realms came here, they would be crushed by the light of the abyss.

It's not just the cause of the light, but the point of light in the abyss of light is also creating an attraction to the surrounding matter.

He even doubted that this point of light would give birth to something amazing over an infinite period of time.

Maybe the Ultimate Realm Lord has a way to destroy it, but he also wants to know what will be bred, so he keeps it.

This possibility is also there.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged in the abyss, silently comprehending everything in the abyss.

He wanted to comprehend the special power contained in the abyss of light, so as to create an ultimate dimensional killing move.

But now, he has many ultimate talents, which gives him hope.

I saw that he was immersed in enlightenment, as if there were many mysteries emerging, coupled with many dimensional star weapons and multi-dimensional wisdom light and other secret techniques that were conducive to analysis and creation, so that Ye Tian had countless spiritual light perceptions.

Time passes slowly.

During this period, many strong people have been here, but many of them have been enlightened for a while and left, obviously there is nothing to gain.

There are still too few Nine Realm peak powerhouses who have really stayed here, and they won't waste their time here.

But Ye Tian felt hope, so he kept coming here to comprehend.

Other than that.

On the side of the Golden True Sea, Ye Tian was still collecting resources, occasionally killing with some extremely powerful Nine Realms peak powerhouses, and he was often hunted down.

There have even been many times when he has been beheaded by some terrifying powerhouses, but the other party has only killed him with a copy body, and has no ability to really kill him.

It is worth mentioning that the Ultimate Ancient Monument has still not been found, but those strong people still haven't given up, and they will continue to look for it.

A long time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally made a breakthrough on Guangyuan's side.

Wow!

Ye Tian turned into a ray of light, tearing apart the abyss of light, and quickly shuttled through the sea of dimensions.

Immediately after, this light diverged one after another, as if each of them was Ye Tian, and then many rays of light converged together and became Ye Tian.

"'~Ultimate Dimension Killer Move - Split Light!'

This dimensional killing move gave Ye Tian an incomparably terrifying speed, and it could divide one ray of light, even if he killed a ray of light, it could still only kill part of his power, and he could not completely kill him.

This killing move is not suitable for combat, but if it is used to escape, it will be difficult for the enemy to kill him, as long as he escapes a ray of light, he can slowly recover.

On some special occasions, this ultimate dimensional killing move is undoubtedly extremely useful.

And after creating this ultimate dimensional killing move, Ye Tian's body has become stronger.
